Use this endpoint to find negative keywords in different ad groups within the same campaign. Use the associated `campaignId` in the URI. # Find Ad Group Negative Keywords

**Web Service Endpoint**

Fetches negative keywords in a campaign’s ad groups.

## Discussion

Use this endpoint to find negative keywords in different ad groups within the same campaign. Use the associated `campaignId` in the URI. Find calls use [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector] [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Condition] operators to narrow results. If you don’t specify any selector conditions, the API returns all negative keywords across all ad groups of the campaign. See the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/NegativeKeyword] object for details about [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector] `condition` operators per field.

### Payload example: Find ad group negative neywords



## Ad Group Negative Keywords Endpoints

- **Create Ad Group Negative Keywords**: Creates negative keywords in a specific ad group.
- **Get an Ad Group Negative Keyword**: Fetches a specific negative keyword in an ad group.
- **Get All Ad Group Negative Keywords**: Fetches all negative keywords in ad groups.
- **Update Ad Group Negative Keywords**: Updates negative keywords in an ad group.
- **Delete Ad Group Negative Keywords**: Deletes negative keywords from an ad group.
